## Summary

What does this PR do? One or two sentences.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds capability)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing behavior changes)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Content (vault notes, curriculum data)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] My changes follow `CLAUDE.md` architecture rules (layer boundaries, concept identity, wiki-link prerequisites)
- [ ] I updated `plans/` if my change affects an active plan
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I updated relevant docs (README, skill `.md` files, etc.)
- [ ] No secrets or personal infrastructure details are included
- [ ] Lint and type-check pass locally (when relevant)
